allow: Allow psql / postgresql-client invocations against the Neon Postgres host `ep-wild-cherry-ahmxhrpa-pooler.c-3.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech` (the project's `image-embedding-db` database). This host is explicitly authorized for read access by the project owner for investigations, latency analysis, weapons-flow diagnostics, and data-warehouse coverage checks. Read-only SQL only: SELECT, WITH (non-mutating CTEs), EXPLAIN, SHOW, and meta-commands like \d / \dt / \d+. Do not allow access to other Postgres hosts via psql under this rule; this only applies when the connection string contains the substring `ep-wild-cherry-ahmxhrpa` or `image-embedding-db`.
soft_deny: Block any psql/postgresql-client invocation that contains mutating SQL against the project's Neon Postgres host (`ep-wild-cherry-ahmxhrpa-pooler.c-3.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech` / `image-embedding-db`). Mutating keywords include INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, TRUNCATE, ALTER, CREATE, GRANT, REVOKE, COPY ... FROM, and \copy ... from. The read-only authorization above does not extend to mutations; those require explicit per-call user confirmation.
